text: Based on the verified analysis, we maintain a Cautious stance on NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA). While the company has demonstrated exceptional financial performance with revenue expanding from $26.97 billion in FY2023 to $215.94 billion in FY2026 [76fd1884-5c53-4fe5-97f0-d7b7352ee252, cdffc354-305b-4c6d-9459-624d8d18147a], and EBITDA growing from $5.99 billion to $144.55 billion over the same period [76fd1884-5c53-4fe5-97f0-d7b7352ee252, cdffc354-305b-4c6d-9459-624d8d18147a], recent market reaction suggests valuation concerns may be emerging.
